__fixture__.name: manual_review_schema_drift_preserves_prior
__fixture__.scenario: An imported package carries a workspace-authority body whose schema equivalence map is missing, so import cannot prove meaning was preserved. The schema outcome is Manual review: the package is not applied as authority, the pane stays as a placeholder, and the prior artifact is kept available for compare and export so a human can decide.
doc_sections: UI/UX Spec 6.14 Workspace serialization, portable-state packages, and restore provenance
TDD state/schema governance, mixed-version controls, and release-evidence rules

missing_surface_placeholders.notes: Authority body kept as evidence pending human schema review; it was not rehydrated as live authority.

notes: Manual review. A missing schema equivalence blocked silent widening; the prior artifact stays available for compare and export and nothing was applied as authority.
